title: Urban Living PRESERVATION THE MINI GLASS BOTTLE WITH CORK CAP 100ML
features: ADVANCED FUNCTIONALITY - Designed for the preservation of aromatic liquids, this glass bottle offers reliable sealing thanks to its cork stopper, which prevents oxidation and degradation of flavors, ensuring the optimal preservation of your oils, vinegars and sauces.

CONVENIENT USE: Perfect for everyday use or for catering events, this bottle allows for precise and elegant dispensing of your condiments, suitable for both home use and professional presentation in catering settings.

Selected materials: Made of high quality glass, this bottle guarantees transparency and robustness, while the natural cork stopper, which is environmentally friendly and durable, offers an optimal seal to preserve the authenticity and purity of your liquids.

CONTEMPORARY DESIGN - Its minimalist and modern aesthetic, coupled with the natural beauty of cork, gives this bottle a chic and refined look that visually enhances your products, while integrating seamlessly into any contemporary or traditional kitchen space.
description: This 100 ml glass bottle from the "Les Minis" collection is ideal for storing and presenting oils, vinegars or sauces. Its natural cork stopper provides an airtight seal, ensuring liquids retain their aroma and freshness, while adding a modern and stylish touch to your kitchen.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Hand Wash Only, Store in a Cool Dry Place, Away from Direct Sunlight
